name: podcast
description: Generate Korean podcast episodes from any source (URLs, tweets, articles, PDFs) — analyzes content, writes a script, generates audio via OpenAI TTS, converts to MP4, and auto-uploads to YouTube. Use this skill whenever the user says 'make a podcast', 'convert to podcast', 'podcast', 'create an episode', 'turn this into audio', 'YouTube podcast', 'turn this article into a podcast', 'publish as audio', or provides sources and wants them transformed into a listenable format. Supports partial execut
author: team-attention
summary_zh: 这是个能一键把网页、文章或PDF等资料转成韩语播客视频并自动上传YouTube的工具。适合想省去写稿录音麻烦，快速把文字内容变成可听节目的人。
